prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GUNCLEANKIT-10PC Product Type: GUN_CLEANING_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor .22 Caliber Gun Cleaning Kit Brushes Canvas Pouch 10 Piece Set Description: Every responsible firearm owner knows the importance of keeping your weapons clean. With the ASR Outdoor 10 Piece .22 Cal Gun Cleaning Kit, you can ensure that your firearms are clean, polished, rust-free and dependable.

This set comes with 10 gun cleaning tools to keep your .22 caliber firearms in top shape. Inside the kit, you'll find three 7.5" rifle rod extenders, a patch slot holder, a rod extender with handle, a brass brush, a chamber brush, a double-ended nylon brush, and a plastic bottle for lubricant (lubricant not included.) The nylon and brass brushes will help remove rust, paint and other debris from your firearms.

All of the accessories included fit neatly inside of a sturdy OD green canvas pouch, so you can easily bring your cleaning kit with you or add it to your range bag. The pouch even comes with a belt loop so you can wear it, and it has durable metal snap closures to keep supplies organized during transit.

In addition to cleaning, polishing, removing rust or removing paint from your firearms, these cleaning tools are also great for hobbies, crafting and automotive hardware purposes. Make sure to keep this cleaning kit on hand before your next hunting trip, range session or hobby project. Search Terms: gun cleaning supplies kits firearm brushes double ended hand tools soft bristle for nylon brush plastic copper abrasive scrubbing hunting Features: - .22 CALIBER GUN CLEANING KIT - Comes with Everything You Need to Clean .22 Cal Firearms - 10 Pieces - RIFLE ROD EXTENDERS - (3) 7.5" Rod Extenders, Extender with Handle and Patch Slot Holder for Cleaning Rifles - NYLON, BRASS, AND CHAMBER BRUSHES - Removes Rust, Paint, Residue and More from Your Firearm | Regular Cleaning Helps Ensure Weapon is Functioning Properly for Reliable Use - PLASTIC OIL BOTTLE - Small Plastic Bottle for Lubricant (Lubricant Not Included) | Essential for Maintaining Firearms - OD GREEN CANVAS POUCH - All Accessories Fit Neatly Inside 10" Length Carry Pouch | Snap Closure to Keep Supplies Organized === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10-Piece .22 Caliber Gun Cleaning Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10-Piece .22 Caliber Gun Cleaning Kit
